measures.name: CA Monde J-1
Budget Monde J-1
max J-1
measures.expression: VAR __list =  { [CA Monde J-1], [Budget Monde J-1]}  RETURN MAXX(__list,[Value])

measures.name: Taux obj J-1
measures.expression: DIVIDE([CA Monde J-1], [Budget Monde J-1])

measures.name: Prog CA Comparable J-1
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    DIVIDE([CA Monde J-1]-[CA Comparable J-1 A-1],[CA Comparable J-1 A-1]),
    'Comparable Flag'[Comparable flag]="yes")

measures.name: Prog CA Non Comparable J-1
Taux de marge Monde J-1
Prog marge comparable Monde J-1
Prog marge non comparable Monde J-1
CA Monde Semaine
measures.expression:
VAR __last_week = MAX('Calendar'[YearWeek])
RETURN
CALCULATE(
    [GMV excl. VAT],
'Calendar'[YearWeek]= __last_week
)

measures.name: CA Monde Mois

RETURN
CALCULATE(
    [GMV excl. VAT],
    'Calendar'[YearMonth] = __last_month
)

)

measures.name: Date_Valeur
measures.expression:
VAR __last_day = MAX('Calendar'[Date])

RETURN
"Vue globale au " & FORMAT(__last_day, "dd/mm/yyyy")

    'Comparable Flag'[Comparable flag]="yes")

measures.name: Prog marge non comparable Monde mois
Prog marge non comparable Monde année
CA Monde J-1 Formatté
measures.expression:
var calc = [CA Monde J-1]
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE() ,
        calc > 1000000000 ,  format( calc / 1000000000,  "#,0.0\B € "   ),
        calc > 1000000 ,  format(calc / 1000000,  "#,0.0\M € "  )    ,
        calc > 1000 ,  format(calc / 1000,  "#,0.0\K € " ),
   ROUND(calc,1)
    )

measures.name: CA Monde Semaine Formatté
measures.expression:
var calc = [CA Monde Semaine]
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE() ,
        calc > 1000000000 ,  format( calc / 1000000000,  "#,0.0\B € "   ),
        calc > 1000000 ,  format(calc / 1000000,  "#,0.0\M € "  )    ,
        calc > 1000 ,  format(calc / 1000,  "#,0.0\K € " ),
   calc
    )

measures.name: CA Monde Mois Formatté
measures.expression:
var calc = [CA Monde mois]
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE() ,
        calc > 1000000000 ,  format( calc / 1000000000,  "#,0.0\B € "   ),
        calc > 1000000 ,  format(calc / 1000000,  "#,0.0\M € "  )    ,
        calc > 1000 ,  format(calc / 1000,  "#,0.0\K € " ),
   calc
    )

measures.name: CA Monde Année Formatté
measures.expression:
var calc = [CA Monde Année]
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE() ,
        calc > 1000000000 ,  format( calc / 1000000000,  "#,0.0\B € "   ),
        calc > 1000000 ,  format(calc / 1000000,  "#,0.0\M € "  )    ,
        calc > 1000 ,  format(calc / 1000,  "#,0.0\K € " ),
   calc
    )

measures.name: CA Monde J-1 Format
measures.expression:
var calc = [CA Monde J-1]
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE() ,
        calc > 1000000000 ,   calc / 1000000000   ,
        calc > 1000000 ,  calc / 1000000,
        calc > 1000 ,  calc / 1000,
      calc
    )

measures.name: Poids de la business unit dans le CA J-1
measures.expression:
VAR currentCA = [CA Monde J-1]
VAR totalCA = 
    CALCULATE (
        [CA Monde J-1],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( Store[Business unit] ) 
        -- On retire le filtre uniquement sur la Business Unit pour avoir le total global
    )
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( currentCA, totalCA )

measures.name: Poids de la business unit dans le CA Semaine
measures.expression:
VAR currentCA = [CA Monde Semaine]
VAR totalCA = 
    CALCULATE (
        [CA Monde Semaine],
        REMOVEFILTERS ( Store[Business unit] ) 
       )
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( currentCA, totalCA )
